profile.bio: My name is Ruslan (Russ) Dashkin. I am a Computer Engineer with a decade of industry and academic experience in semicondutor physics, computer architecture, digital design, synchronous and asynchronous logic, and commercial and open-source EDA. I am currently interested in the special purpose architectures that levarage advantages of asynchronous logic and device physics.

education.description: Asynchronous RISC-V CPU Design with presilicon validation on synchronous FPGAs.
5.5 year program with focus on semiconductor physics and computer engineering.
